message:
fix(benchmark): use real tsc compiled with EdgeBox, remove fake transpiler

- Remove hardcoded native transpiler (native_transpiler.zig, etc.)
- Benchmark now compiles real npm typescript with edgeboxc
- Compares EdgeBox-compiled tsc vs Node.js tsc vs esbuild vs swc
- This tests EdgeBox as a runtime, not a fake transpiler

files.patch:
@@ -1,24 +1,24 @@
-name: Transpiler Benchmark
+name: Runtime Benchmark
 
 on:
   push:
     branches: [main]
     paths:
-      - 'src/transpile/**'
+      - 'src/**'
       - 'benchmark/**'
   pull_request:
     branches: [main]
     paths:
-      - 'src/transpile/**'
+      - 'src/**'
       - 'benchmark/**'
   workflow_dispatch:
 
 concurrency:
-  group: transpiler-${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
+  group: benchmark-${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
   cancel-in-progress: true
 
 jobs:
-  transpiler-benchmark:
+  runtime-benchmark:
     runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
     strategy:
       fail-fast: false
@@ -51,44 +51,39 @@ jobs:
           npm init -y || true
           npm install -D typescript esbuild @swc/cli @swc/core
 
-      - name: Run EdgeBox internal benchmark
-        run: |
-          echo "=== EdgeBox Native Transpiler Benchmark (${{ matrix.os }}) ==="
-          zig run -OReleaseFast src/transpile/bench.zig
-
-      - name: Build EdgeBox TSC CLI
-        run: |
-          zig build-exe -OReleaseFast benchmark/edgebox-tsc.zig -o benchmark/edgebox-tsc 2>/dev/null || echo "CLI build skipped (deps may be missing)"
+      - name: Build EdgeBox compiler
+        run: zig build cli
 
-      - name: Run comparison benchmark
+      - name: Run benchmark
         run: |
+          echo "=== EdgeBox Runtime Benchmark (${{ matrix.os }}) ==="
           cd benchmark
-          bun run run.ts 2>&1 || echo "Comparison benchmark completed"
+          bun run run.ts 2>&1 || echo "Benchmark completed"
 
       - name: Upload results
         uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
         with:
-          name: transpiler-results-${{ matrix.os }}
+          name: benchmark-results-${{ matrix.os }}
           path: benchmark/results.json
           if-no-files-found: ignore
 
   summary:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    needs: transpiler-benchmark
+    needs: runtime-benchmark
     if: always()
     steps:
       - name: Download All Results
         uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
         with:
-          pattern: transpiler-results-*
+          pattern: benchmark-results-*
           merge-multiple: true
           path: results
 
       - name: Generate Summary
         run: |
-          echo "# TypeScript Transpiler Benchmark" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "# EdgeBox Runtime Benchmark" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
-          echo "Comparing EdgeBox vs tsc, esbuild, and swc" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "Comparing EdgeBox-compiled tsc vs Node.js tsc vs esbuild (Go) vs swc (Rust)" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
           echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
 
           if [ -f results/results.json ]; then
@@ -106,7 +101,8 @@ jobs:
         with:
           script: |
             const fs = require('fs');
-            let body = '## TypeScript Transpiler Benchmark\n\n';
+            let body = '## EdgeBox Runtime Benchmark\n\n';
+            body += 'Comparing EdgeBox-compiled tsc vs Node.js tsc vs esbuild (Go) vs swc (Rust)\n\n';
 
             try {
               const results = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('results/results.json', 'utf8'));
@@ -119,15 +115,15 @@ jobs:
                 body += `| ${r.codebase} | ${r.tool} | ${r.files} | ${r.lines.toLocaleString()} | ${r.timeMs.toFixed(0)} | ${lps} |\n`;
               }
 
-              // Speedups
-              const tscResults = results.filter(r => r.tool === 'tsc');
-              if (tscResults.length > 0) {
-                body += '\n### Speedup vs tsc\n\n';
-                for (const tsc of tscResults) {
-                  const others = results.filter(r => r.codebase === tsc.codebase && r.tool !== 'tsc');
+              // Speedups vs Node.js tsc
+              const nodeTscResults = results.filter(r => r.tool === 'node-tsc');
+              if (nodeTscResults.length > 0) {
+                body += '\n### Speedup vs Node.js tsc\n\n';
+                for (const nodeTsc of nodeTscResults) {
+                  const others = results.filter(r => r.codebase === nodeTsc.codebase && r.tool !== 'node-tsc');
                   for (const other of others) {
-                    const speedup = (tsc.timeMs / other.timeMs).toFixed(1);
-                    body += `- **${other.tool}** on ${tsc.codebase}: ${speedup}x faster\n`;
+                    const speedup = (nodeTsc.timeMs / other.timeMs).toFixed(1);
+                    body += `- **${other.tool}** on ${nodeTsc.codebase}: ${speedup}x faster\n`;
                   }
                 }
               }
